[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111110 6
1 0001110 3
2 1111010 5
3 0101111 5
4 1011100 4
5 1101110 5
6 0011100 3
7 1111010 5

01 10 0110010 3
12 21 0001110 3 match 1
23 32 0001010 2
34 43 0101010 3
45 54 0101111 5 match 3
56 65 0000000 a
67 76 0010000 1
70 07 0010010 2

02 20 0000010 1
13 31 1111010 5 match 2 7
24 42 0001110 3 match 1
35 53 1101010 4
46 64 0000000 a
57 75 0000010 1
60 06 0010000 1
71 17 0010010 2

03 30 0110010 3
14 41 0101110 4
25 52 0001110 3 match 1
36 63 0010000 1
47 74 0000010 1
50 05 0100011 3
61 16 0010000 1
72 27 0000010 1

04 40 0100011 3
15 51 1101110 5 match 5
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0010010 2
